CustomField.description: Used in the Training Checklist DocuSign templates to identify the Trainer’s name.
CustomField.formula:
CASE( TEXT(Educator_Type__c),
"CPT", External_Trainer__r.FirstName & " " & External_Trainer__r.LastName, "CC", External_Trainer__r.FirstName & " " & External_Trainer__r.LastName,
"IT", IF(ISBLANK(Internal_Trainer__c), CSM__r.FirstName & " " & CSM__r.LastName, Internal_Trainer__r.FirstName & " " & Internal_Trainer__r.LastName),
"CTS", IF(ISBLANK(Internal_Trainer__c), CSM__r.FirstName & " " & CSM__r.LastName, Internal_Trainer__r.FirstName & " " & Internal_Trainer__r.LastName),
NULL )
CustomField.label: Assigned Trainer Name
